allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; games=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['games']; [print\(g['home_team'], g['stadium'], g['score']\) for g in games]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(g['home_team'], '|', g['stadium'], '|', g['score']\) for g in data['games']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(g['home_team'], '|', g['stadium'], '|', g['status'], '|', g['score']\) for g in data['games']]")
